reviews.review_description: With a little work this could be a really great game. I can't seem to get the button to work. I had well over $8000 in my account but never was able to get the upgrades.  You also need a way to turn down or off the music while playing. The physics also need work. Maybe a little more instruction on what to do and how would also be nice.  It's a fast-paced zombie shooter that is fun to play but it needs work to get it perfect.

reviews.review_title: Fun zombie shooter and is a little jumpy
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy this game, I was confused to begin with because I didn’t know how to grab the weapons that the zombies drop, but I would definitely recommend this game to my mates for a fun jumpy VR shooter. I hope one day that new maps get added into the game like a DLC.
The game is a fun vr starter , for the price its a must have

Just tried out this VR arcade zombie shooter and honestly, it’s fantastic. The second you put the headset on you’re thrown into a world that’s fun, genuinely scary in all the right ways, and ridiculously addictive.

The gameplay hits that perfect balance between chaotic action and proper challenge — nothing feels cheap, but you’re constantly on edge, double-checking behind you because the zombies just keep coming. It's refreshing to find a game where you actually have to develop your skills and not just progress without trying.

Whether you’re a VR pro or a total beginner, it’s an absolute blast. Easily one of the most exciting and challenging VR shooters I’ve played. Highly recommended.
fun game , the grabbing of weapons is a little difficult but still fun . Hoards of zombies

Deadsplash feels like pure arcade fun. bright colours, loud music, and zombies popping up everywhere while you try to survive. Loads of choices of weapons and booby traps galore. Zombies come from everywhere!
Decent graphics, physics need tweaked. Gameplay was good.
This is the best zombie game I’ve ever experienced with action
